title: Las que tienen que servir
actors: Concha Velasco, Amparo Soler Leal, Laura Valenzuela
plot: In the sixties, U.S.A.F and Spanish Air Forces share the military base at "Torrejon de Ardoz", Spain. An american aviator and his wife take a couple of spanish maids in order to serve in their house. Both maids are engaged with lo...
